name: Skoof Simulator
detailed_description:
Special Offer


About the Game

Welcome to the world of Skoof, where everyday life turns into an epic adventure!.

This is a unique and sarcastic game in which you have to manage the life of Skoof, an ordinary working man who likes to spend time on the couch and play tanks. After all, a premium Tank won't knock itself out!
The game combines elements of simulation and adventure with humorous overtones.

Fight with your boss for the bonus in a tense duel, where every action you take can affect the result.


While the whole civilized world was developing, Skoof was degraded and morally decayed. But now he has to go out into the Real World!

Participate in the fight with gopniks behind the garages and prove that you are able to protect your interests.

FEATURES

- Work your shift at your favorite factory, performing various tasks:
- Guide youngsters through unexpected situations;
- Put your socks in the corner;
- Appreciate old memes and share them with others;
- And also perform a number of tasks that Scoof would never dare to do.

- Humor and Irony: The game is filled with apt jokes and comical situations that will make you laugh until you cry.
- Unique approach: Ordinary activities are turned into exciting mini-games and adventures.
- Sarcastic look at the routine: The game offers to see the usual things in a different light and remember that even in the routine can be found something funny and surprising.

Enter the life of Scoof and enjoy his everyday life with humor and irony! Are you ready to take on the challenge and show that you can handle the main character's story better than he can?

Chop nettles with a stick

WARNING

The game is made purely for fun and is not trying to offend anyone or anything.
